nasb.text: He looked, and saw a well in the field, and behold, three flocks of sheep were lying there beside it, for from that well they watered the flocks. Now the stone on the mouth of the well was large.

esv.text: As he looked, he saw a well in the field, and behold, three flocks of sheep lying beside it, for out of that well the flocks were watered. The stone on the well’s mouth was large,

cnv.text: 他看見田間有一口井；有三群羊躺臥在井旁，因為人都是用那井裡的水給羊群喝；井口上有一塊大石頭。

ccb.text: 看见田间有一口井，有三群羊卧在井边，因为当地人用那口井的水饮羊。井口盖着一块大石头。

csbs.text: 他观看，见田野中有一口井。看哪，有三群羊卧在井旁，因为那口井是供给畜群饮水的。井口上有一块大石头；
